opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain in my left side is agonizing, I'm vomiting from it, and my whole body aches down to the bones.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The left-side pain came on suddenly hours ago, it's unbearable, nothing I take at home helps, and I keep being sick.

symptom_narrative.onset: the severe left-side pain started suddenly about 6 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: about 6 hours of the bad pain; the aching bones, constipation, tiredness and constant thirst have been building for around six months
symptom_narrative.character: the side pain comes in gripping, stabbing waves; my bones ache all over, a deep dull ache
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the side pain is the worst I've ever had, 10 out of 10, I can't keep still
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in my left side and back, and it spreads down to my groin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the side pain comes and goes in waves; the aches, tiredness and thirst are there all the time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I've tried lying down and over-the-counter painkillers and they don't touch it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I can't get comfortable in any position, and I feel sick and keep vomiting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling sick and vomiting, terrible constipation for months no matter what I take, feeling really tired and weak, weeing a lot and always thirsty
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had pain like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit still — I'm pacing and doubled over; I can't work, eat or sleep

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no medical conditions I've been told about; I've just felt run down and achy for months

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, and is worried about coping because there is no one else at home to help while being this unwell and vomiting

objective_data_offered.value: still passing some urine, but a lot less than normal because I keep being sick and can't keep fluids down
drenched in sweat and can't stop pacing because of the pain
feels warm but hasn't taken a temperature and doesn't feel shivery or have shaking chills
